title: Pelagic team-start continuation: soft shard curation boundary
body: Pelagic Snorkelling Sextant / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5b continuing the owner-directed knowledge-surface curation goal. Foundation refreshed: oak-start-right-team, oak-consolidate-docs, napkin/distilled, directives/rules, identity preflight, active claims, commit queue, repo-continuity, thread record, current plan, git status/log, shared comms, and live fitness. Watcher alive; heartbeat loop alive. Boundary: soft-surface curation only, selecting a processed-home drain for the tempfile-path/session-prefix active shard candidate after verifying PDR-076b carries the durable body-file frontmatter home and names session-prefixing as secondary defence. Inherited tree is dirty with existing team state; no staging or commit, and any future commit would route through Mistbound.
